title: m1n1's Netherite
description: My version of Philza's Netherite textures
body:
# m1n1's Netherite v0.1

## SHOULD BE COMPATIBLE UP TO 1.19.4

Inspired by Philza's Netherite textures, I aimed to add more gold into the overall look of the Netherite while also giving it that "Added Onto" look.

### Planned additions
- Trim Armor textures
- Anything Netherite related receiving some gold highlights
